title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js.

title: React & Next.js Masterclass
description: Master React hooks, context, and build production-ready apps with Next.js App Router.

title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
description: Learn design thinking, wireframing, and prototyping with Figma from the ground up.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Explore data analysis, visualization, and machine learning basics using Python and Pandas.

title: Node.js & Express API Development
description: Build scalable REST APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB using best practices.

title: TypeScript Complete Guide
description: Go from JavaScript to TypeScript with generics, interfaces, and advanced type patterns.

title: Machine Learning with TensorFlow
description: Deep dive into neural networks, CNNs, and RNNs using TensorFlow and Keras for real-world AI applications.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
description: Get certified in AWS by learning core cloud concepts, IAM, EC2, S3, and serverless architecture.

title: Flutter Mobile App Development
description: Build beautiful cross-platform iOS and Android apps using Flutter and Dart from scratch.

title: Graphic Design with Adobe Illustrator
description: Create stunning logos, icons, and vector illustrations using Adobe Illustrator's core tools.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Learn ethical hacking, network security, threat analysis, and how to protect systems from cyberattacks.

title: SQL & PostgreSQL for Developers
description: Master relational databases with SQL queries, joins, indexing, and PostgreSQL advanced features.
